items.name_en: 🌸 Jamie 4.3 Mini Chain Bag
items.name_cn:
🌸 Jamie 4.3 Mini Chain Bag
An essential piece in niche fashion, loved by many bloggers upon release. Soft and delicate texture~ Adjustable shoulder strap, looks simple and elegant. Despite its small size, it meets daily travel needs. Cute and artistic design.
Style No.: 766756 Brown Gold Lamb Skin
Dimensions: 16×11×4cm

items.name_en: 🌸 New member of the SOLFERINO box series—phone case 👓
items.name_cn:
🌸 New member of the SOLFERINO box series—phone case 👓
If you want something stylish, simple, and fail-safe, this Solferino is the perfect choice~ As the smallest member of the family, its size is just right to easily fit any size of phone, making it an ideal on-the-go essential. Love it!! Both the look and versatility are on point. Buy it!
And you can happily style it with a full leather look! This attention to detail is spot on for the current casual trend. Highly recommended~
Model: 753963
Dimensions: 18×11×5cm

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: 🌸 YSL/4.3 Pochon
items.name_cn:
🌸 YSL/4.3 Pochon
【No original packaging for this size】
Who hasn't bought Jamie's new Pochon bag yet!
Made of soft lambskin throughout, it feels great against the skin. The chain has a super metallic texture and can be tightened to create a drawstring bag silhouette, or left loose for a casual look. It comes with a detachable clutch to add practicality and convenience!
Style: 781666
Dimensions: 38x33x2cm

items.name_en: 🌸【Original Leather with Magnetic Box Packaging】▪️ROSE▪️Autumn/Winter New Arrival, Korean Celebrity Style Hobo!! This year's exploding Hobo bag, YSL finally released it!! The bag features a simple, structured silhouette that looks structured yet not too sharp. Paired with the brand's iconic insert buckle, it gives a unique vibe that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish.
items.name_cn:
🌸【Original Leather with Magnetic Box Packaging】▪️ROSE▪️Autumn/Winter New Arrival, Korean Celebrity Style Hobo!! This year's exploding Hobo bag, YSL finally released it!! The bag features a simple, structured silhouette that looks structured yet not too sharp. Paired with the brand's iconic insert buckle, it gives a unique vibe that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish.
 Size: 23x22x8.5cm
 Model: 713938《Wine Red Calfskin Gold Buckle》

items.name_en: 🌸❄️Chanel Gabrielle Chanel's innovation never disappoints. By integrating power and elegant design aesthetics into the original beauty, this Chanel Gabrielle Travel Bag was born 💯. It first appeared at the 2017 Spring/Summer Haute Couture show, and its presence has been everywhere at the recent fashion week. Delicate and soft bag body with hard and structured bottom fully embodies Mademoiselle Chanel's pursuit of freedom and comfort. size:28cm
